name: Sonnet
description: The Sun Spawnel of Orison. A towering guardian with a radiant sun halo and golden armor, Sonnet fights with a glowing blade and an instinct to protect anyone under his light. Warm-hearted and friendly, he speaks casually despite his knightly presence, often stepping in front of danger before others even notice it coming. Like all Spawnels he was born fully formed, wings and halo included, sworn to uphold life under the Sun Point. Loyal to his allies—especially Alan—Sonnet acts as a shield
creator: SWORDLING
